synopsis:
"Bait" is a short story by Alan Dean Foster. Published in Star Wars Insider 162, it focused on the character Grummgar, who made an appearance in Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens.
It was also collected in the paperback version of the movie novelisation.
https://www.youtini.com/book/star-wars-episode-vii-the-force-awakens
title: Bait
